package rulefixtures

import (
	gorm "gorm.io/gorm"
)

// scenario for bun_newdb_per_request: Bun DB handles created directly on request paths instead of reused process-level state.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: data_access; severity: warning.
type Rule247NegativeRecord struct { ID int }

func scenario247Negative(db *gorm.DB, ids []int) error {
	if len(ids) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	return db.Where("id IN ?", ids).Limit(len(ids)).Find(&[]Rule247NegativeRecord{}).Error
}
